pages.purpose: Single agent-docs page documenting the project's CLI interface, mechanisms, dependencies, and status. Must conform to docs/AGENT_DOCS_SCHEMA.md.

references.note: agent-docs schema produces structured data, not narrative prose. Calibrate against src/pages/agent-docs/table-manager.mdx for shape; /project1/search-trend.astro is a legacy human-friendly page for the same project and should NOT be referenced as a style model.

provisionalNote: Second pilot of the v2 /document-project pipeline. The docStyle block is included to satisfy devdeck-research-agent v1 which still expects a rich brief; the content-agent and validator stages use the new schema contract. A follow-up update to research-agent should accept minimal briefs (path + scope + kind).
